title: myagrum syriacum
intro: Myagrum syriacum, also known as Syrian rocket or Garden rocket, is a cool-season annual plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae) native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Myagrum syriacum include reducing inflammation, treating digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems, such as coughs and colds. The plant can be prepared as an herbal remedy in various forms, including teas, infusions, and salves, which are commonly used to treat skin conditions and wounds.
